body.title: audit-design: add blackout-path question for dispatch/spawn designs
body.result: added Check 11 (cc-blackout-path) to audit-design skill: triggers on spawn/dispatch/escalate keywords, AMEND when no explicit CC spend cap or block/hold routing; updated levers doc counts from 10 to 11
body.description:
Add a 10th check to audit-design: 'Does this design create a path to CC blackout?' Triggers when the design narrative mentions: dispatch, spawn, escalate, launch, worker, inference, CC. Requires: explicit cap on CC spend per failure mode; if unbounded, returns AMEND with 'add hard cap or replace with block/hold pattern.'

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/audit-design (or equivalent audit script)
**Design rules:** constraint-query-first — check palace.constraints.* before ruling; behavioral constraint C-no-cc-auto-spawn must be checked for any spawn-adjacent design
**Scope boundary:** in: one new check, triggered by keyword match in design narrative. out: full constraint graph traversal (future)
**Completion criteria:** (1) audit-design returns AMEND on a design narrative containing 'escalate to CC' with no explicit cap; (2) PASS on a design that uses block/hold instead; (3) check documented in audit-design skill
